sections.paragraph:
verb לסתום

to clog; plug, cork, block, fill (teeth); talk obscurely, speak vaguely

verb להיסתם

be clogged; plugged, corked, blocked, filled (teeth); be concealed, vague

verb להסתתם

be stopped up, sealed, blocked

masculine noun

block, plug, obstruction; stopper

adverb

just, only, merely; mere; undefined, casual; simple, not special

adverb

just
